description_long: This greengrocer is situated in a brick commercial building with a flat, modern facade and a recessed entryway. The exterior is composed of reddish-brown brickwork, with large black-framed doors and windows, and a small overhang above the entrance. A group of people, dressed in winter clothing and holding grocery bags, are gathered in front of the entrance, suggesting active business and foot traffic. The ground is paved with gray stone or concrete, extending from the building to the edge of the scene. There are no visible produce stands or displays outside, and the windows appear dark, possibly indicating an indoor market setup. The overall appearance is urban and functional, with a focus on accessibility and customer flow.
description: A brick-fronted urban greengrocer with a recessed entrance, large black doors, and a group of shoppers holding grocery bags outside. The building has a modern, functional design with paved stone surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, brick facade, and a line of people with grocery bags standing outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the recessed entryway, and the line of people extending along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the building with large windows and no visible people or produce.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the group of people from behind and the building's side wall.
